scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field3] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=udp> Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Expires: 5 User-Agent: MU Test Tool Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE, PRACK, ACK, BYE, CANCEL, OPTIONS Session-Expires: 86400 P-Called-Party-ID: <sip:user1-business@example.com> P-Visited-Network-ID: example.com P-Access-Network-Info: IEEE-802.11a;cgi-3gpp=default P-Charging-Vector: icid-value=1234bc9876e;icid-generated-at=10.0.0.1;orig-ioi=example.com P-Charging-Function-Addresses: ccf=10.0.0.1;ecf=ecf.example.com Content-Type: application/sdp Supported: timer Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
-->
